summary: Iteration 24: Tested Font Package feature - independent font switching on Settings page. All 13 test cases passed (100%). Font picker card is separate from theme picker with 4 options (Brand, Duckfake, Kid-Ergarten, Hikaru). Each font option shows 'Aa' sample in actual font. Font switching works correctly with toast confirmations. Font persists across navigation and page reload via localStorage. Font and theme are independent - can combine Duckfake font with Gold theme. Active font card shows dot indicator.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 verified Font Package feature. ThemeProvider exports FONT_PACKAGES array with 4 fonts (brand, duckfake, kindergarten, hikaru). Font state is managed separately from theme via fontPkg state and FONT_STORAGE_KEY ('field-quality-workspace-font'). AppShell applies 'font-{id}' CSS class to workspace-shell (no class for 'brand' default). App.css has Google Fonts imports and CSS overrides for .font-duckfake (Permanent Marker), .font-kindergarten (Patrick Hand), .font-hikaru (Fredoka). Font picker is a Card section on Settings page with data-testid='settings-font-card'. Individual font options have data-testid='settings-font-option-{id}'.

font_picker_card.exists_separate_from_theme: PASS - Font Package card is separate from Workspace Theme card
font_picker_card.four_options_present: PASS - Brand, Duckfake, Kid-Ergarten, Hikaru all present
font_picker_card.aa_sample_text: PASS - Each font card shows 'Aa' sample in actual font family
font_picker_card.active_dot_indicator: PASS - Active font card shows green dot indicator like theme cards

font_switching.duckfake: PASS - Permanent Marker font applied to all text (grungy handwritten)
font_switching.kindergarten: PASS - Patrick Hand font applied (childlike handwriting)
font_switching.brand: PASS - Cabinet Grotesk + Manrope restored (no font class)

font_persistence.across_navigation: PASS - Font persists when navigating from Settings to Overview
font_persistence.localStorage: PASS - Font stored in localStorage key 'field-quality-workspace-font'
font_persistence.after_reload: PASS - Font persists after page reload

font_theme_independence.simultaneous_application: PASS - Duckfake font + Gold theme both apply simultaneously
font_theme_independence.separate_localStorage_keys: PASS - Font and theme stored in separate localStorage keys

repeat_offenders_readability.kid_ergarten_font: PASS - All sections readable with Patrick Hand font
repeat_offenders_readability.sections_visible: PASS - Courses of Action, Closed-Loop Coaching, Heatmap, Crew Training cards all visible
